synopsis: Rei Furuya, Jinpei Matsuda, Hiromitsu Morofushi, Wataru Date and Kenji Hagiwara are now graduated from the police academy. Note: - This episode is the fifth and final episode of the Keisatsu Gakkou-hen - Wild Police Story arc. - It was supposed to be episode 1077 in its parent story Meitantei Conan

title: Otaku-chans
synopsis: Two loose and cute cats, Riri and Popo, go on short animated adventures based on “enriching everyday life with everyone’s geek activities and promotions.” Riri is a "menhera" (mentally unstable) cat not blessed by the idol she supports while Popo is an airheaded cat who is cute in a devilish way. Otakuchanzu is the first anime to be originally created for TikTok. (Source: Anime News Network & Official YouTube Channel)

title: Korasho no Kaitei Wakuwaku Daibouken!
titleNative: 映画コラショの海底わくわく大冒険!
synopsis: The character Korosho, a spirit of a randsell backpack, is from Benesse's "Shinken Zemi Shogaku Kouza" correspondence course for early elementary schoolers. The film is a collaboration with the Japan Agency for Marine-Earth Science and Technology (JAMSTEC) and Team Kuroshio, a team of researchers and engineers dedicated to studying the ocean floor.

title: Secret Catch! Teenieping

title: No More Prince
synopsis: This is the legendary tale of valiant princes, devoting their lives to rescue the princess from the evil drake that has been terrorizing the nation… "Here I am, my damsel in distress, I will smite the dragon and return you back to the golden castle!" when the brave prince roars his promise, our beautiful princess Mikaella asks the question to drake. "Xeno, I don't want to be saved by him... Please take care of him." The mighty "evil" dragon responds, "Anything for my sweet Mikaella." (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Terror Man
synopsis: Jungwoo Min has a special ability, one that lets him see when a path leads to a misfortune, or disaster. He uses his "Eyes of Misfortune" to spot these unfortunate events and stop them. Disguising himself as a terrorist, he begins using his power to save people from certain danger. This leads him to become feared by the people he is looking to save. Soon he discovers that the more he saves others, the unhappier he becomes. Thus unfolds the story of a hero and his struggle between happiness and despair. And the unfortunate reality of saving the world, even while becoming a supposed terrorist...or TERROR MAN! (Source: ABLAZE)

title: Observing Elena Evoy
synonyms: My Observational Diary of Elena Evoy
伊莲娜·埃沃的观察日志 #웹소설
synopsis: "If you're not my rival, why do I feel this way?" Blessed with both beauty and brains, it was only natural for Johann to be the top student at the Academy - that is until Elena Evoy appears. To make things worse, she seems completely unfazed by his charms, shattering his self-esteem. So why can't he stop thinking about her? (Source: Manta)

title: Heugjangmi Buinui Munbanggu
synopsis: Ms. Blackrose’s Stationary Store differentiates itself from the typical campus horror with mysterious and scary storyline. Extraordinary characteristic of Ms. Blackrose also adds interesting and peculiar atmosphere to this unique animation. Every episode portrays a story between a kid who tries to find Ms. Blackrose’s Stationary Store and Ms. Blackrose herself, based on motifs from Korean ghost stoies, Asian old legends and folktales and and classic gothic horror novels.

title: Undetectable Box
synopsis: I often fall into the fantasy upon her back. What kind of person is she? What does she like? What world view does she hold? From the occasional detailed observations of her daily life, I have inferred many unexplainable clues... After a series of fantastic imagination, I suddenly realized that the girl who has been dialoging with me in my mind is just my own wishful thinking. Therefore, on the day of the reunion, I decided to take this step...
